---
title: "Schedule"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  freeze: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(readxl)
library(glue)
library(downloadthis)
library(fontawesome)
library(gt)
library(xfun)
library(gtExtras)
library(fontawesome)

source("./nopublish/sched_prep.R")

fontawesome::fa_html_dependency()
```

### Week 1: `r topics$Topic[[1]]`

```{r}
tbl_fx(1)
```

### Week 2: `r topics$Topic[[2]]`

```{r}
tbl_fx(2)
```

### Week 3: `r topics$Topic[[3]]`

```{r}
tbl_fx(3)
```

### Week 4: `r topics$Topic[[4]]`

```{r}
tbl_fx(4)
```

### Week 5: `r topics$Topic[[5]]`

```{r}
tbl_fx(5)
```

### Week 6: `r topics$Topic[[6]]`

```{r}
tbl_fx(6)
```

### Week 7: `r topics$Topic[[7]]`

```{r}
tbl_fx(7)
```

### Week 8: `r topics$Topic[[8]]`

```{r}
tbl_fx(8)
```

### Week 9: `r topics$Topic[[9]]`

### Week 10: `r topics$Topic[[10]]`

```{r}
tbl_fx(10)
```

### Week 11: `r topics$Topic[[11]]`
